holdings.infoBox: XAR is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Rocket Lab stock at 4.53%, Carpenter Technology at 4.12%, ATI Inc. at 3.71%, Hexcel at 3.48%, and Moog Inc. at 3.47%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Aerospace & Defense ETF (XAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US aerospace & defense companies. XAR was launched on Sep 28, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
